question: In Wix Editor, what are the steps to add and display a Schedule section on your page?
answer: First, click the 'Add' button in the top navigation bar. Then, select the 'Schedule' section from the left-side menu (highlighted with red background and white text). The schedule section will load in the main editing area with placeholder header text.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add' button located in the top navigation bar of the Wix editor interface.
The user selects the 'Schedule' section from the left-side menu, which is highlighted with a red background and white text.
The schedule section loads up on the main editing area, displaying a placeholder text for the header title and subtitle.

question: In Wix Editor, how do you modify the year in a Schedule section's subtitle and confirm the change?
answer: Type the desired year (e.g., '2025') into the 'Header Subtitle' field within the schedule section. The screen will immediately update to display the new year in the subtitle format.
keypoints: The user types '2025' into the 'Header Subtitle' field within the schedule section.
The screen updates to reflect the new year in the subtitle, showing 'January 24, 2025'.

question: In Wix Editor, what happens when you add a new item to a Schedule section?
answer: Click the 'Add Item' button under the list items section. A new schedule item labeled with a default time (e.g., '12:30 PM') will appear below existing items.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add Item' button under the list items section.
A new schedule item appears below the existing ones, labeled as '12:30 PM'.

question: In Wix Editor, how do you access editing options for a schedule item after adding it?
answer: Click the 'Edit' button next to the newly added schedule item. This displays edit options allowing modifications to time, description, and other details.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Edit' button next to the newly added schedule item.
The edit options for the schedule item are displayed, allowing modifications to the time, description, and other details.

question: In Wix Editor, how can you adjust an element's dimensions using the Tools panel?
answer: Drag the 'Brush Size' slider within the 'Tools' panel to increase or decrease its value. The size change will be visually reflected on the selected element in the design preview.
keypoints: The user drags the 'Brush Size' slider within the 'Tools' panel to adjust the size of an element, increasing its value.
The change in size is visually reflected on the selected element in the design preview.

question: In Wix Editor, what is the process to change a Schedule section's background color?
answer: Select a color option from the 'Section Colors' dropdown menu in the left sidebar. The chosen color will be applied to the schedule section's background, altering its appearance.
keypoints: The user selects a color option from the 'Section Colors' dropdown menu in the left sidebar.
The selected color is applied to the background of the schedule section, changing its appearance.

question: In Wix Editor, what occurs when initiating the publishing process?
answer: Click the 'Publish' button at the top-right corner. A confirmation dialog box will appear, prompting you to finalize publishing.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Publish' button located at the top-right corner of the Wix editor.
A confirmation dialog box appears, prompting the user to finalize the publishing process.

question: In Wix Editor, how do you add a schedule item and immediately edit its properties?
answer: After clicking 'Add Item' to create a new schedule item, click its 'Edit' button. This reveals options to modify time, description, and other details.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Add Item' button under the list items section.
A new schedule item appears below the existing ones, labeled as '12:30 PM'.
The user clicks on the 'Edit' button next to the newly added schedule item.
The edit options for the schedule item are displayed, allowing modifications to the time, description, and other details.
